name: @ismail-elkorchi/pdf-engine
description: Evidence-driven cross-runtime PDF parsing, reading, viewing, and extraction engine.

scripts.lint: eslint src jsr scripts test eslint.config.mjs --max-warnings=0
scripts.lint:fix: eslint src jsr scripts test eslint.config.mjs --fix --max-warnings=0
scripts.docs:check:jsr: npm run docs:lint:jsr && npm run docs:test:jsr
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run verify:runtimes && npm run docs:check:jsr
scripts.test:coverage:node-lower: c8 --all --src src --exclude 'test/**' --exclude 'scripts/**' --report-dir coverage/node-lower --reporter text-summary --reporter json-summary --reporter lcov npm run test:node:lower
scripts.test:runtime:browser:compat: npm run test:runtime:browser && npm run test:runtime:browser:firefox && npm run test:runtime:browser:webkit && node test/runtime/compare-browser-runtime-reports.mjs reports/test-runtime-browser.json reports/test-runtime-browser-firefox.json reports/test-runtime-browser-webkit.json
scripts.test:runtime:all: npm run test:runtime:node && npm run test:runtime:deno && npm run test:runtime:bun && node test/runtime/compare-runtime-reports.mjs reports/test-runtime-node.json reports/test-runtime-deno.json reports/test-runtime-bun.json && npm run test:runtime:browser:compat
scripts.test:integration:node: npm run build && npm run smoke:compiled:node && npm run smoke:web && npm run smoke:browser
scripts.test:integration:bun: npm run build && npm run smoke:compiled:bun
scripts.test:integration: npm run test:integration:node && npm run test:integration:deno && npm run test:integration:bun
scripts.test:all: npm run build && npm run test:coverage:node-lower && npm run test:runtime:all && npm run test:integration && npm run test:fuzz
scripts.smoke:browser:compat: npm run smoke:browser:firefox && npm run smoke:browser:webkit
scripts.smoke:node: npm run build && npm run smoke:compiled:node
scripts.smoke:bun: npm run build && npm run smoke:compiled:bun
scripts.smoke:all: npm run build && npm run smoke:compiled:node && npm run smoke:deno && npm run smoke:compiled:bun && npm run smoke:web && npm run smoke:browser
scripts.check:ci: npm run check && npm run test:all
